subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was present before the Face, and whatsoever was inscribed therein was beheld. Praise thou the Beloved of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات بین یدی الوجه حاضر و آنچه در او مسطور مشاهده شد حمد کن محبوب عالمیان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
